basics.name: Quentin Fournier
basics.summary: I’m a Research Fellow at Mila, where I’m leading a thematic lab on language models for drug discovery. I'm currently focusing on understanding how to adapt all aspects of the LLM pipeline, from data processing and pre-training to alignment and evaluation, to the unique characteristics of biological data such as genomes, proteins, and small molecules.

work.name: Mila
work.summary: Leading a thematic research lab focused on advancing machine learning for drug discovery.
